instruction:
Find the derivative of the function $y = \frac{ 3 \cdot \csc(x) - 2 \cdot \sin(x) }{ 5 \cdot \left(\cos(x)\right)^5 } - \frac{ 16 }{ 5 } \cdot \cot(2 \cdot x)$.

Options:
A. 1 / (sin(x)^2 * cos(x)^5)
B. 1 / (sin(x)^2 * cos(x)^5 * cos(x)^2)
C. 1 / (sin(x)^2 * cos(x)^5 * sin(2x))
D. 1 / (sin(x)^2 * cos(x)^4)
E. 1 / (sin(x)^2 * cos(x)^5 * cos(x))
F. 1 / (sin(x)^2 * cos(x)^6)
G. 1 / (sin(x)^2 * cos(x)^5 * sin(x))
H. 1 / (sin(x)^2 * cos(x)^7)
I. 1 / (sin(x)^2 * cos(x)^5 * cos(2x))
J. 1 / (sin(x)^2 * cos(x)^8)
